books.title: Data Structures in C
books.author: Reema Thareja
books.description: A complete guide to understanding data structures using C programming.
books.authorBio: Reema Thareja is a renowned computer science author known for writing clear and practical textbooks on programming and data structures.

books.title: Core Java Volume I
books.author: Cay S. Horstmann
books.description: Comprehensive introduction to Java programming and object-oriented concepts.
books.authorBio: Cay S. Horstmann is a professor and bestselling programming author famous for his books on Java programming.

books.title: Computer Networks
books.author: Andrew S. Tanenbaum
books.description: Detailed concepts of networking fundamentals and protocols.
books.authorBio: Andrew S. Tanenbaum is a computer science professor known for his textbooks on networking and operating systems.
